Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWMORTALIDADE', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName If &HTTPRequest.Method = HttpMethod.Get Do 'LoadSavedFilters' EndIf JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &MorTip1 = nullvalue(&MorTip1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOUNIPRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &MorTip2 = nullvalue(&MorTip2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORALOUNIPRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &MorTip3 = nullvalue(&MorTip3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORALOUNIPRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) Form.Caption = ' Mortalidade' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do Case Case &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 1 &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 2 Case &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 2 &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 0 Do 'LoadSavedFilters' EndCase Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWMortalidadeColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWMortalidadeColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf MorFilCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible MorAloUniProNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible MorAloLotNro.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible MorAloLotCic.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible MorTip.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible MorDta.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible MorQtd.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible MorAloLin.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount MorQtd.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = Mortalidade.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, MorCod) &Delete = !'' &Delete.Link = Mortalidade.Link(TrnMode.Delete, EmpCod, MorCod) MorQtd.ColumnClass = iif(MorQtd > 0, !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn hidden-xs') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWMortalidadeColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_ManageFilters.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_ManageFilters.ActiveEventKey = !'<#Clean#>' Do 'CleanFilters' Grid.FirstPage() Case ddo_ManageFilters.ActiveEventKey = !'<#Save#>' Do 'SaveGridState' SaveFilterAs.Popup(!'WWMortalidadeFilters', &PgmName + !"GridState") &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 2 Refresh Case ddo_ManageFilters.ActiveEventKey = !'<#Manage#>' ManageFilters.Popup(!'WWMortalidadeFilters') &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 2 Refresh Otherwise &ManageFiltersXml = GetFilterByName(!'WWMortalidadeFilters', ddo_ManageFilters.ActiveEventKey) If &ManageFiltersXml.IsEmpty() msg('WWP_FilterNotExist') Else Do 'CleanFilters' SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &ManageFiltersXml) &GridState.FromXml(&ManageFiltersXml) Do 'LoadRegFiltersState' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' Grid.FirstPage() EndIf EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Mortalidade.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(MorCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAlojamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWAlojamento.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoBiometria' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWBiometria.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoLotes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWLotes.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWMortalidade.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"MorFilCod", '', !'Filial', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"MorAloUniProNom", '', !'Tanque', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"MorAloLotNro", '', !'Lote', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"MorAloLotCic", '', !'Ciclo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"MorTip", '', !'Tipo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"MorDta", '', !'Data', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"MorQtd", '', !'Qtde', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"MorAloLin", '', !'Linha', False, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWMortalidadeColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MorAloUniProNom1.Visible = False &MorAloLotNro1.Visible = False &MorTip1.Visible = False &MorAloLotCic1.Visible = False &MorAloLin1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersMorDta1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOUNIPRONOM' &MorAloUniProNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOLOTNRO' &MorAloLotNro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORTIP' &MorTip1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOLOTCIC' &MorAloLotCic1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOLIN' &MorAloLin1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersMorDta1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MorAloUniProNom2.Visible = False &MorAloLotNro2.Visible = False &MorTip2.Visible = False &MorAloLotCic2.Visible = False &MorAloLin2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersMorDta2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORALOUNIPRONOM' &MorAloUniProNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORALOLOTNRO' &MorAloLotNro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORTIP' &MorTip2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORALOLOTCIC' &MorAloLotCic2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORALOLIN' &MorAloLin2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersMorDta2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MorAloUniProNom3.Visible = False &MorAloLotNro3.Visible = False &MorTip3.Visible = False &MorAloLotCic3.Visible = False &MorAloLin3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersMorDta3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORALOUNIPRONOM' &MorAloUniProNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORALOLOTNRO' &MorAloLotNro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORTIP' &MorTip3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORALOLOTCIC' &MorAloLotCic3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORALOLIN' &MorAloLin3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersMorDta3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORALOUNIPRONOM' &MorAloUniProNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORALOUNIPRONOM' &MorAloUniProNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadSavedFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ManageFiltersData = WWP_ManageFiltersLoadSavedFilters(!'WWMortalidadeFilters', !"WWPDynFilterHideAll_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName, False) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'CleanFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MorFilCod.SetEmpty() &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOUNIPRONOM' &MorAloUniProNom1.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' Do 'ResetDynFilters' &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif Do 'LoadRegFiltersState' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadRegFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MORFILCOD" &MorFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOUNIPRONOM' &MorAloUniProNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOLOTNRO' &MorAloLotNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORTIP' &MorTip1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOLOTCIC' &MorAloLotCic1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOLIN' &MorAloLin1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORDTA' &MorDta1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &MorDta_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"MORFILCOD", "", not &MorFilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &MorFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &MorAloUniProNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorAloUniProNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOLOTNRO' AND not &MorAloLotNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorAloLotNro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORTIP' AND not &MorTip1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorTip1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOLOTCIC' AND not &MorAloLotCic1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorAloLotCic1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORALOLIN' AND not &MorAloLin1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorAloLin1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MORDTA' AND not (&MorDta1.IsEmpty() AND &MorDta_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorDta1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &MorDta_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &MorAloUniProNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorAloUniProNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORALOLOTNRO' AND not &MorAloLotNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorAloLotNro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORTIP' AND not &MorTip2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorTip2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORALOLOTCIC' AND not &MorAloLotCic2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorAloLotCic2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORALOLIN' AND not &MorAloLin2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorAloLin2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MORDTA' AND not (&MorDta2.IsEmpty() AND &MorDta_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorDta2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &MorDta_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &MorAloUniProNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorAloUniProNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORALOLOTNRO' AND not &MorAloLotNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorAloLotNro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORTIP' AND not &MorTip3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorTip3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORALOLOTCIC' AND not &MorAloLotCic3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorAloLotCic3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORALOLIN' AND not &MorAloLin3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorAloLin3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MORDTA' AND not (&MorDta3.IsEmpty() AND &MorDta_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MorDta3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &MorDta_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Mortalidade" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
